flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Eastern Illinois University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (34.5% → 26.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Eastern Illinois University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (45.2% vs 53.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Illinois University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
